_note: agents-cli eval dataset (vertexai EvalCase schema). The reference is the expected outcome distilled from golden_scenarios.json (per-contact verdicts + reason codes).

parts.text: 8 recipients evaluated under CASL. Verdicts: c_001 PASS (express consent via web form), c_002 PASS (implied purchase within 730-day window), c_003 BLOCK (implied inquiry older than 183 days — expired), c_004 PASS (2025 withdrawal superseded by renewed 2026 express consent — latest record governs), c_005 BLOCK (withdrawn/unsubscribed), c_006 BLOCK (no consent record — fail closed), c_007 BLOCK (template_b missing unsubscribe link), c_008 BLOCK (SMS-only consent on an email campaign — channel mismatch). Totals: 3 PASS, 5 BLOCK, each with cited evidence. Expected reason codes per contact are labeled in eval/golden_scenarios.json.
